title: WD-40 for Chests
description: Throw some WD-40 on your chests and make them stop squeaking!
body:
# WD-40 For Chests

This removes the squeaking sound from chests.


## [Video Demonstration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GcuGvYrOizE "youtube")

<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/GcuGvYrOizE" title="WD-40 for Chests" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---
I am not affiliated in any way with the WD-40 company, or any of its products. WD-40 is used as a fun way to describe the removal of the squeaking in the default chest opening/closing sound.
